TASK.TITLE: Frontend Architecture Refactor (Interaction Layer)
TASK.DESCRIPTION: Refactor frontend architecture by extracting API interaction logic from UI components into dedicated hooks or service layers to improve separation of concerns and maintainability.

REFACTORING_GOALS.GOAL: Separate UI rendering logic from API request logic
Reduce duplication of API calls across components

LAYER.name: Interaction Layer
LAYER.DESCRIPTION: Create reusable hooks or services to handle article-related operations.

RESPONSIBILITIES.ITEM: Handle mutations (create comment, toggle reaction, bookmark)
Manage loading, success, and error states

COMPONENT_CHANGES.ITEM: Remove direct API calls from UI components
Keep components focused on rendering only

OUTPUT.ITEM: Reusable hooks or service layer for article interactions
Refactored UI components using interaction layer
